anti_claim: Workstream driver recency coalescer validates a public UI grouping helper and copied non-secret frontend source body only; it does not authorize live cockpit reads, frontend release, source mutation, provider calls, or whole-system correctness.

public_private_boundary.public_inputs: synthetic AttentionRecentChange rows, public source refs, validator refs, negative-case ids, and copied non-secret WorkstreamBoard.tsx source module body with hashes and anchors

standard_payload.anti_purpose: A prose-only mention of WorkstreamBoard or a source-body copy without runnable grouping validation, negative cases, source-module manifest, and public/private boundary.
failure_modes: active_driver values are not trimmed and lowercased for the grouping key
collision count increments but latest summary or gate reason does not refresh from the newest event
rows sort by insertion order or count instead of latestIso descending
unclassified fallback bucket is allowed to outrank classified drivers by recency
fixture or receipt claims live cockpit, release, source-mutation, provider-call, or whole-system authority
source module manifest missing, target body digest stale, or declared WorkstreamBoard anchor absent
receipt embeds copied frontend body text instead of carrying public refs, hashes, counts, and verdicts
standard_payload.ontology: A public semantic-validator organ for WorkstreamBoard.tsx groupByDriver: active_driver categorical coalescing, count aggregation, newest-wins summary/gate refresh, recency-desc sorting, and unclassified sentinel-last behavior.
standard_payload.teleology: Show that a small real frontend helper has crossed the Microcosm membrane as runnable public substrate without pretending to classify workstreams or inspect live UI state.

contract_projection_basis.authority_boundary: computed standard-lattice contract only; existing authority_ceiling remains the operative claim ceiling.

validation_rules: Every source module row must point to an exact copied WorkstreamBoard.tsx body with matching hash, line count, and anchors.
Public exercise must prove driver trim/lower key coalescing, collision count, newest-wins field refresh, recency-desc sort, and unclassified sentinel-last behavior.

Private cockpit state, browser/HUD state, provider payload bodies, operator transcript bodies, credential material, release authority, source-mutation authority, and whole-system correctness claims are rejected.
Receipts must carry refs, hashes, counts, verdicts, and omission boundaries without embedding copied source body text.

author.purpose: create a valid Workstream driver recency coalescer instance

refine_instance.purpose: improve an existing Workstream driver recency coalescer without corrupting authority

refine_standard_and_propagate.purpose: change std_microcosm_workstream_driver_recency_coalescer and propagate through governed artifacts plus generated lattice projections

source_authority_ref: microcosm-substrate/AXIOMS.md#1 (JSON is contract; Markdown is projection)

doctrine_kind_envelope.note: This standard conforms to the universal doctrine-kind envelope; markdown, Mermaid, Atlas, coverage, health, and entry-card views are generated projections of this JSON source.

anti_claims: Workstream driver recency coalescer validates a public UI grouping helper and copied non-secret frontend source body only; it does not authorize live cockpit reads, frontend release, source mutation, provider calls, or whole-system correctness.

Active v2 standard status is a source JSON contract state only; it does not expand release, publication, provider dispatch, private-root equivalence, product-readiness, or whole-system correctness authority beyond the authority_ceiling.

runtime_acceptance_refs.uplift_basis: registry-backed source standard already carried accepted, active, source-body-import, or body-floor status; this update narrows it into the active v2 JSON contract shape without raising its authority ceiling.
